scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail --kill-timeout 3000 --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:platform: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail --kill-timeout 3000 --names backend,platform --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev:platform -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.verify:backend: npm run prisma:generate -w backend && npm run lint -w backend && npm run test:backend
scripts.verify:frontend: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run test:frontend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.verify:release: npm run prisma:generate -w backend && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run verify:prerender -w frontend && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
